content: WaLeads (waleads.com.br): Chrome/Edge extension + Windows app over WhatsApp Web. Features: unlimited-column Kanban with drag-drop, contact renaming, notes/tasks/reminders per contact, custom tags with filtering, advanced chat search, quick replies/scripts, message scheduling, keyword auto-responder, broadcasts, multi-agent shared WhatsApp with inter-agent messaging, dashboard/reports (volume, avg response time, agent performance), deal value tracking on CRM cards, optional chatbot add-on, API integration. Pricing: Basic R$79.90/mo (1 user); Premium R$179.90/mo (up to 4 users, real-time sync, transfers). 3-day free trial no card; QR activation for team members.
